revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-380

Special retinal receptor elements which are presumed to be primarily concerned with perception of light and colour stimuli, when the eye is adapted to light (see "photopic vision", 2-1-330).

Reference: C.I.E.
